title: Exquisite Vietnamese Sevaiiya Noodles
description: Salty, chewy, indulgent Vietnamese dish featuring sevaiiya, en-croute, dash-friendly, this recipe brings together the best of Vietnamese flavors in a single bowl of noodles.
instructions: Cook the sevaiiya noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced grilled pork to the skillet and cook until heated through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce and soy sauce.
Pour the sauce mixture over the pork and onion mixture in the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the pork and sauce mixture.
Stir in the bean sprouts and cook until heated through.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter and top with chopped scallions and sesame seeds.
